raw_records.text_sample: ’ Bharti Airtel Limited – Media Release May 13, 2026 Bharti Airtel Limited Q4 FY26 Highlights • Bharti Airtel posts consolidated quarterly revenues of Rs 55,383 crore, growth of 15.7% YoY and 2.6% on QoQ basis, driven by sustained growth in India and robust performance in Africa. • India business posts quarterly revenues of Rs 39,566 crore, up 7.7% YoY and 0.9% QoQ.
